title: Vijayaraghava Perumal temple
tagline: Vijayaraghava Perumal temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vijayaraghava Perumal temple is a Vishnu temple in Thirupputkuzhi, a village in Kanchipuram district in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Vijayaraghava Perumal temple is a Vishnu temple in Thirupputkuzhi, a village in Kanchipuram district in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated about 7 miles west of Kanchipuram and half a kilometre from Baluchetti Chattiram, which lies on the Chennai - Vellore highway. Constructed in Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Naalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as one among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu. Vishnu is worshiped as Vijayaraghava Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Marag

topPlaces.name: Panapakkam
topPlaces.description: Panapakkam is a panchayat town in Nemili Taluk within Chennai Metropolitan Area of Ranipet district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, about 46 kilometres from Vellore city and 30 kilometres from Ranipet and 85 kilometres from Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Pudupakkam
topPlaces.description: Pudupakkam is a village near Chennai, India. It is closer to Siruseri SIPCOT. This village comes under Vandalur taluk of Chengalpattu district in Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Tiruppanangadu Talapurisvarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruppanangadu Talapurisvarar Temple is a Shiva temple located at Tiruppanangadu in Tiruvannamalai district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Vellakulam
topPlaces.description: Vellakulam is a village located in the Tenkasi District (Earlier with Tirunelveli District till Year 2019) of South Tamil Nadu, India. The village is located 20–25 km from Kovilpatti and Sankarankovil.

topPlaces.name: Trilokyanatha Temple
topPlaces.description: Trilokyanatha Temple, also called Thirupparuthikundram Jain temple or Jeenaswamy Trilokyanathar temple, is an 8th-century Digambara Jain temple in Thiruparthikundram, in northeast Kanchipuram in Tamil Nadu, India. The suburb and the area around this temple is also called Jain Kanchi.

topPlaces.name: Kailasanathar Temple, Kanchipuram
topPlaces.description: The Kailasanathar Temple, Kanchipuram, also referred to as the Kailasanatha temple, is a Pallava-era historic Hindu temple in Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu, India. Dedicated to Shiva, it is one of the oldest surviving monuments in Kanchipuram.

topPlaces.name: Ona Kantheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Ona Kantheeswarar Temple (also called Onakanthali) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Panjupettai, Kanchipuram, Kanchipuram district in Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Ona Kantheeswarar and his consort Parvathi as Kamakshi.

topPlaces.name: Anekadhangavadeswarar temple
topPlaces.description: Anekadhangavadeswarar Temple (also called Anegathangavadham) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Kanchipuram, near Kailasanathar temple, Kanchipuram district in Tamil Nadu, India. Anekadhangavadeswarar is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam, the 275 temples revered in the canon.

items.note: Panapakkam is a panchayat town in Nemili Taluk within Chennai Metropolitan Area of Ranipet district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, about 46 kilometres from Vellore city and 30 kilometres from Ranipet and 85 kilometres from Chennai.
Pudupakkam is a village near Chennai, India. It is closer to Siruseri SIPCOT. This village comes under Vandalur taluk of Chengalpattu district in Tamil Nadu.
Tiruppanangadu Talapurisvarar Temple is a Shiva temple located at Tiruppanangadu in Tiruvannamalai district of Tamil Nadu, India.

Vellakulam is a village located in the Tenkasi District (Earlier with Tirunelveli District till Year 2019) of South Tamil Nadu, India. The village is located 20–25 km from Kovilpatti and Sankarankovil.

Trilokyanatha Temple, also called Thirupparuthikundram Jain temple or Jeenaswamy Trilokyanathar temple, is an 8th-century Digambara Jain temple in Thiruparthikundram, in northeast Kanchipuram in Tamil Nadu, India. The suburb and the area around this temple is also called Jain Kanchi.

The Kailasanathar Temple, Kanchipuram, also referred to as the Kailasanatha temple, is a Pallava-era historic Hindu temple in Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu, India. Dedicated to Shiva, it is one of the oldest surviving monuments in Kanchipuram.

Ona Kantheeswarar Temple (also called Onakanthali) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Panjupettai, Kanchipuram, Kanchipuram district in Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Ona Kantheeswarar and his consort Parvathi as Kamakshi.

Anekadhangavadeswarar Temple (also called Anegathangavadham) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Kanchipuram, near Kailasanathar temple, Kanchipuram district in Tamil Nadu, India. Anekadhangavadeswarar is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam, the 275 temples revered in the canon.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vijayaraghava Perumal temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vijayaraghava Perumal temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vijayaraghava Perumal temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (61 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (75 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vijayaraghava Perumal temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vijayaraghava Perumal temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vijayaraghava Perumal temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vijayaraghava Perumal temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vijayaraghava Perumal temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Panapakkam, Pudupakkam, Tiruppanangadu Talapurisvarar Temple, Vellakulam, Trilokyanatha Temple.
